calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-01-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Herbert Donalson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger
Petitioner, Robert David Christensen present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Michael Robert McAnaney.
Decree signed in open court.
